name: render-boot-basic-ready
description: VIC pixel-render parity gate: boot to the deterministic BASIC-ready screen (border light-blue, background blue, '**** COMMODORE 64 BASIC V2 ****' / 'READY.' + cursor), screenshot via the WS session/screenshot method, and PIXEL-diff the decoded RGBA against the TS oracle golden PNG. NOT a PNG-container byte diff (zlib output differs between the Rust `png` crate and Node's encoder, which would spuriously RED) — both PNGs are decoded to raw RGBA and compared pixel-for-pixel.
